title: ardisia subcuneifolia
intro: Ardisia subcuneifolia, also known as a type of flowering plant in the Ardisia genus, is a shrub native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ardisia subcuneifolia include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Ardisia subcuneifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of Asia.
